name: TRIIM regimen
summary: Combination thymus-regeneration regimen using growth hormone, DHEA, metformin, vitamin D, and zinc, tracked for an uncontrolled human epigenetic-age and immunosenescence pilot plus a no-results extension registry.
aliases: Thymus Regeneration, Immunorestoration and Insulin Mitigation
mechanism_summary: Combines endocrine and metabolic components intended to support thymic regeneration while mitigating growth-hormone-associated insulin effects and measuring immune and epigenetic-aging biomarkers.

open_questions: Whether the uncontrolled epigenetic-age signal replicates in randomized TRIIM-X-style testing
Which regimen component drives any observed immune or epigenetic biomarker change
Whether endocrine risks and long-term safety are acceptable in aging-directed use
